name: Market Research
description: Structured market analysis: TAM/SAM/SOM estimation, problem identification, opportunity scoring, trend detection, and risk signals.

inputs.name: sector
inputs.description: Target sector or market to analyze

outputs.name: tam
outputs.description: Total Addressable Market estimate with reasoning

outputs.name: problems
outputs.description: Top 5 identified problems with severity scores

outputs.name: trends
outputs.description: Active market trends with direction indicators

outputs.name: risks
outputs.description: Risk signals with likelihood and impact
